member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.FireWeaponHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the FireWeaponHelper for sending a FireWeapon
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the FireWeapon
to.
member.remarks: One shot message apply a force to the hand as we fire the gun that should be in this hand.
